services.title: Electrical Manufacturing
services.description: High-precision production of premium switchgears, distribution boards, and heavy-duty electrical components.

services.title: Industrial Solutions
services.description: End-to-end turnkey power distribution layouts designed for high-voltage industrial plants and factories.

services.title: OEM Manufacturing
services.description: Scalable original equipment manufacturing services tailored to national and international brand specifications.

services.title: Custom Products
services.description: Bespoke engineering for custom control panels, distribution boards, and distinct busway configurations.

services.title: Technical Support
services.description: Dedicated expert guidance for installation, load calculations, and commissioning.

services.title: After Sales Support
services.description: Prompt troubleshooting, comprehensive AMC services, and original spares supply.

products.name: Current Transformers (CTs)
products.shortDesc: Wide range of CTs for metering and protection applications.
products.desc: Engineered for precise step-down current measurement, our current transformers are built for both commercial metering and protection systems, withstanding extreme short-circuit impacts.

products.name: Potential Transformers (PTs)
products.shortDesc: Reliable PTs for accurate voltage measurement.
products.desc: High-accuracy voltage potential transformers designed to safely step down high transmission line voltage levels for voltmeter and relay protection circuits.

products.name: Metering Solutions
products.shortDesc: Advanced metering solutions for energy management.
products.desc: Smart digital energy meters and modular metering panels featuring Modbus and RS485 communication protocols for real-time energy audits and building management.

products.name: Control Panels
products.shortDesc: Custom control panels for safe & efficient operations.
products.desc: APFC, MCC, and PLC automation panel assemblies built inside vermin-proof sheet enclosures. Thoroughly audited for temperature rise and insulation safety.

products.name: Accessories
products.desc: Heavy-duty copper busbars, insulators, wire shrouds, and terminal connectors built to standard specs for safe, clean electrical installations.

team.name: Mr. Ashoke Kumar
team.bio: 25+ years of engineering leadership in high-voltage power components.

team.name: Dr. Rajeev Sharma
team.bio: PhD in Smart Grid Architectures. Leads control panel and PLC development.

team.name: Mrs. Neha Gupta
team.bio: Lead auditor certified for international ISO 9001:2015 safety guidelines.

testimonials.text: Ashoka's Potential Transformers have been outstanding in our regional grid systems. Highly reliable and IEC compliant.
We have sourced modular metering and CTs for multiple substation upgrades. Outstanding build quality and 24/7 engineering support.
Their custom control panels were delivered on time with perfect dielectric insulation audits. Highly recommend their OEM line.

certifications.title: ISO 9001:2015
certifications.desc: Validates our organizational processes across engineering design, component sourcing, and electrical load safety audits.

certifications.title: ISO 14001:2015
certifications.desc: Validates our green waste management protocols and resource conservation policies across the production assembly plant.

certifications.title: BIS / ISI Mark
certifications.desc: Ensures conformity with commercial grid equipment safety and mechanical wiring protection specifications.

certifications.title: CE Marking
certifications.desc: Aligned with European economic zone standards for industrial switchgear systems and transformer safety ratings.
